description: multiply(a, b) returns a+b instead of a*b. History of 4 commits. Bisect should identify the commit that changed the operator.

input.scenario: multiply(4, 5) currently returns 9 instead of 20. The function worked correctly at tag v1.0. The repo has 4 commits after v1.0. Reproduction command: python3 -c "from mathlib.calc import multiply; import sys; sys.exit(0 if multiply(4,5)==20 else 1)"
